series_metadata.series_description: Reports, minutes, presentations and related materials generated by the Efficiency Initiatives and Efficiency Committee. The Chancellor formed the Efficiency Committee to find and spread best practices in savings and value throughout the University System of Ohio. The areas of efficiency include, but are not limited to, academic, administrative, energy, information technology, and procurement.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Keep in office scanned. or audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. ; Electronic: or audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released
